level5_start.text: You and Antakin descend toward the shoreline. Below, a group of mages and their apprentices move with urgent purpose.

stage5_observation.mageText: Look at them... they’re preparing for something big.

aelthred_approach.text: A mage with eyes like the deep ocean walks toward you. Her presence is calming, yet commanding.

aelthred_intro.mageText: Antakin. Is this the human Valor spoke of in her letters?

antakin_confirms.mageText: It is. The new holder of the deck.

player_shock.text: You blink in surprise. How many people knew you were coming?

aelthred_letter_reveal.mageText: I received the letter first, actually. I was the one who passed it to Antakin.

antakin_flushed.mageText: Hey! It was meant for me anyway, so it doesn't matter who touched it first!

aelthred_warning.mageText: The deck you hold is vulnerable. You must learn to defend yourself in the battles to come. Physically, Mentally, and Magically

player_weakness.text: You look at the cards. Despite everything, you feel small. Unready. A fraud.

head_swelling.text: Suddenly, your head begins to swell. That dark pressure from before starts to claw at your temples.

aelthred_dispel.text: Aelthred snaps a card between her fingers. A wave of cool mist washes over you, dispelling the distress instantly.

aelthred_mordu_target.mageText: Mordu has marked you. He knows exactly what you are capable of becoming.

aelthred_mordu_mystery.mageText: It makes me wonder... he must have been very close to Valor to know her plans for you.

player_mordu_question.text: The name Mordu feels like a curse on your tongue.

choices.text: Do you know more about him?

aelthred_mordu_lore.mageText: He was once an apprentice. Then he discovered the 'Sorcerous'—the power to devour a mage's magic and twist it.

aelthred_trial_info.mageText: To defeat him, you must best him in a Trial of Earth. But you aren't strong enough yet.

aelthred_training_plan.mageText: You must seek the Great Mages: Calla of Reflection, Griamhan of Roots, and Humulus of Eras.

aelthred_training_plan_2.mageText: They do not like to be disturbed, but with Valor's deck on the line, they might as well listen.

aelthred_final_advice.mageText: Keep hope in your heart. Trust yourself. It is the only shield Mordu cannot break.

aelthred_calla_mission.mageText: Go to Calla first. Follow the moon rays across the ocean. They will lead you to her.

antakin_watch.mageText: Don't worry. I'll keep a close watch on this one.

aelthred_warning_final.mageText: You better. We can't let Mordu get the upper hand.

boat_departure.text: You pack your resources and step into the boat. The water ripples beneath you as you prepare for the long journey ahead.

demo_end_modal.text: END OF DEMO. Thank you for playing! This version has been prepared specifically for submission.
